title: Lifetime Server
description: This is a modpack project for the lifetime server
body:
# Kapoowe's Lifetime Pack
This is a Vanilla+ modpack, built on the idea of a lifetime world. Plenty of new strutures, biomes, and mechanics to explore and learn.

# Features:
- Enhanced world generation on both speed and scale
- Minimap
- QoL adjustments and mods
- Beautiful shaderpack
- Dungeons, New villages, and random structures to explore
- New Biomes, blocks, and mechanics

There is a server bundled, however it is invite-only.
